name: Yaulderna Silverstreak
rank: Archmage — Head of the Wizards Tower

equipment.weapons: staff or wand, dagger at the belt

sd_appearance: Tall, graceful half-elf with dark hair streaked silver, wearing deep blue and grey layered robes. Robes feature heavy design with component pockets, occasionally ink-stained and burned. Carries staff, dagger at belt. Glows faintly when thinking. Distinctive visual detail: hands occasionally glow. Wears Guild badge.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: heavy robe with component pockets, often ink-stained, sometimes accidentally burned
